title: Make cabs wheelchair-friendly, consider dedicated vehicles for disabled persons: Supreme Court
description: The Supreme Court recently underscored the need to improve transport access for persons with disabilities and suggested that cab services should be equipped to carry wheelchairs and other assistive devices [Shivjeet Singh Raghaw vs. Union of India & Anr.]. A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta noted that app-based cab services have become widely available, particularly in large cities, and should be adapted to better serve persons with disabilities.“Now, in larger metros, there a
